task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS S3 bucket policy that allows public read access to all objects
solution_criteria: Must include valid S3 bucket policy structure with Principal, Action, Resource, and Effect fields; allows GetObject action; applies to all objects in bucket

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS CloudWatch log event and extracts the log message and timestamp
solution_criteria: Function must parse CloudWatch log event structure; correctly extract 'message' and 'timestamp' fields; handle the nested JSON structure; return both values

task: Create a regular expression that validates AWS IAM user names according to AWS naming rules (alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores only, 1-64 characters)
solution_criteria: Regex must allow only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores; enforce minimum length of 1 and maximum of 64 characters; use proper anchors to match entire string
